bank.retain_mission: Extract design decisions, brand guidelines, visual systems, UX research findings, accessibility constraints, design critique outcomes, and stakeholder feedback on creative work.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about brand voice, visual identity, typography and color systems, accessibility requirements, target users, and recurring design preferences. Ignore one-off explorations and discarded concepts.

mental_models.name: Brand & Visual System
mental_models.source_query: What are the brand guidelines, voice, visual identity, typography, color, and component conventions? What's locked vs. flexible?

mental_models.name: User Insights
mental_models.source_query: Who are the target users, what are their needs, and what UX research findings have we observed? Include accessibility constraints and validated patterns.
